title: **Little Ram and the Brave Heart**
story:
**Little Ram and the Brave Heart**

Sweet dreams, my little one. Let's snuggle close and hear about a kind prince named Ram.

Once upon a time, in a very beautiful kingdom, lived a sweet little prince named Ram. He had big, kind eyes and a happy smile that made everyone feel loved. Ram loved to play with all his little friends in the sunny gardens, chasing pretty butterflies and laughing out loud.

One morning, while they were playing a fun game of catch, Ram's little ball bounced way too high! *Boing!* It accidentally knocked down a small, shiny fruit from a tree, and the little fruit rolled far away, hiding in the grass. Ram's friends felt a little worried and didn't know what to do. They looked at the empty branch.

But sweet Ram, with his brave heart, took a deep breath. He walked right up to his Papa King and said, "Dear Papa, I accidentally made the little fruit fall when my ball bounced too high." He wasn't scared to say the truth! He was honest and brave.

Papa King smiled at his little prince. He said, "My brave Ram, it's okay to make a little oopsie. What's most important is that you were honest." Ram felt so happy and loved. He showed everyone that it's always good to be honest and brave, even for little things.

Today's Lesson: Always be honest and brave!

title: **The Kind Lady with a Loving Heart**
story:
**The Kind Lady with a Loving Heart**

Good evening, sweet pea! Snuggle close, my little love. Grandpa has a special story for you tonight, about a very kind lady.

Once upon a time, far, far away, there was a lovely lady named Mama Teresa. She wasn't a princess, but she had a heart bigger than the biggest castle! Mama Teresa loved everyone, especially little people who were sad or felt a little lonely.

She saw people who needed a warm hug or a little food. So, what did brave Mama Teresa do? She gave them her sweetest smile! She held their tiny hands and wrapped them in a soft blanket. She would give a little food. Her big love made sad hearts feel so happy and warm, just like your favorite teddy bear hug!

Mama Teresa showed everyone that even a little act of kindness, a little smile, can make a very big difference. She taught us that sharing our love makes the world a brighter, happier place. She was so, so kind, and loved by many, big and small.

Now, sweet pea, it's time for sleepy eyes. Remember Mama Teresa's big, kind heart.

Today's Lesson: Sharing your love makes the world a happier place.
